'''bazhacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pseudobactin|pseudobactin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pseudobactin|pseudobactin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| bazhacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæzhæchæth|bæzhæchæth]] || [[word:bæzhæchæj|bæzhæchæj]] || [[word:bæzhæchæsh|bæzhæchæsh]] || [[word:bæzhæchæ|bæzhæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhazhachath|bazhazhachath]] || [[word:bazhazhachaj|bazhazhachaj]] || [[word:bazhazhachash|bazhazhachash]] || [[word:bazhazhacha|bazhazhacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhachath|bazhachath]] || [[word:bazhachaj|bazhachaj]] || [[word:bazhachash|bazhachash]] || [[word:bazhacha|bazhacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhafchath|bazhafchath]] || [[word:bazhafchaj|bazhafchaj]] || [[word:bazhafchash|bazhafchash]] || [[word:bazhafchaf|bazhafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bazhachatha|bazhachatha]] || [[word:bazhachaja|bazhachaja]] || [[word:bazhachasha|bazhachasha]] || [[word:bazhachaka|bazhachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bazhachath|bazhachath]] || [[word:bazhachaj|bazhachaj]] || [[word:bazhachash|bazhachash]] || [[word:bazhacha|bazhacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bazhachathal|bazhachathal]] || [[word:bazhachajal|bazhachajal]] || [[word:bazhachashal|bazhachashal]] || [[word:bazhachakal|bazhachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bazhachathatha|bazhachathatha]] || [[word:bazhachajaja|bazhachajaja]] || [[word:bazhachashasha|bazhachashasha]] || [[word:bazhachaka|bazhachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bazhachathan|bazhachathan]] || [[word:bazhachajan|bazhachajan]] || [[word:bazhachashan|bazhachashan]] || [[word:bazhachakan|bazhachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bazhachathaoro|bazhachathaoro]] || [[word:bazhachajaoro|bazhachajaoro]] || [[word:bazhachashaoro|bazhachashaoro]] || [[word:bazhachakaoro|bazhachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
